name: chess-club-hub
description: Static chess app; build validates Cloud Functions and required files

scripts.build: npm install --prefix functions && node --check functions/index.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=['index.html','app.js','style.css','css/tokens.css','css/primitives.css','config.js'];for(const f of p){if(!fs.existsSync(f)){console.error('Missing',f);process.exit(1);}}console.log('static tree OK');"
